name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new algorithm, visualization, or UX improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Summary
<!-- One sentence describing the feature -->

## 🎯 Feature Category
- [ ] **New Algorithm** — Add a new sorting/pathfinding/data structure algorithm
- [ ] **Visualization Improvement** — Better animation, colors, or visual feedback
- [ ] **UX Enhancement** — Controls, speed, step-through, etc.
- [ ] **New Visualizer** — Entirely new category (e.g., dynamic programming, trees)
- [ ] **Other**

---

## 📝 Detailed Description
<!-- Describe the feature in detail. What should it do? How should it look? -->

## 🎓 Learning Benefit
<!-- How does this help learners understand algorithms better? -->

## 📐 Proposed Implementation
<!-- (Optional) If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them! -->

### For New Algorithms:
- **Algorithm Name**: 
- **Category**: [Sorting / Pathfinding / Data Structure / Graphs / Race Mode / Other]
- **Time Complexity**: O(?)
- **Space Complexity**: O(?)
- **Key Steps to Visualize**: 
  - Step 1: 
  - Step 2: 
  - ...

### For UI/UX Features:
- **Affected Component(s)**: 
- **Mockup/Sketch**: (if available)

## 🔗 References
<!-- Links to algorithm explanations, similar implementations, or design inspiration -->

## 🚀 Priority
<!-- How important is this for learners? -->
- [ ] **Nice to have** — Would be cool, not critical
- [ ] **Should have** — Commonly requested or expected
- [ ] **Must have** — Essential for core learning experience

## ✅ I'm Willing To
- [ ] Implement this feature myself (with guidance)
- [ ] Help test the implementation
- [ ] Provide design mockups
